title: Khaitan & Co assists Fullife Healthcare on raising ₹300 crore from Elev8
description: Fullife Healthcare Private Limited has raised ₹300 crore from Elev8 and its affiliates through a combination of primary subscription (~₹150 crore) and secondary purchase (~₹150 crore).Khaitan & Co advised Fullife Healthcare for this fundraise. The Firm assisted Fullife in review, negotiation and marking up of the transaction documents for Fullife’s fundraise; and execution, CP completion and closing of the transaction.The transaction team consisted of Nidhi Killawala (Partner), Anupama Singh
